1. Venus

2. Earth  
   - Distance: 149,600,000 km  
   - Orbital period: 365.25 days ÷ 365.25 = 1.0 Earth year

   - Distance: 227,900,000 km  
   - Orbital period: 687 days ÷ 365.25 = 1.881 Earth years

4. Jupiter  
   - Distance: 778,500,000 km  
   - Orbital period: 4333 days ÷ 365.25 = 11.863 Earth years

5. Saturn  
   - Distance: 1,434,000,000 km  
   - Orbital period: 10,759 days ÷ 365.25 = 29.457 Earth years

Note: Mercury, Uranus, and Neptune data are not available in the knowledge base and thus excluded."}
